attacking_style: Launches probing attacks from distance (15-70km out) on punchy gradients or decisive sectors (Arbre, Kanarieberg), relying on classics engine rather than explosive acceleration. Mistimes finish gradients when attacks come on steepest sections but finale eases.
team_tactics: Requires full team tempo control into finale (BMC/CCC exhausted domestiques for positioning), benefits from late leadout deployment in final kilometer on dragging finishes. Teams often burn matches controlling too early, leaving him isolated.
terrain_preference: Excels on cobbles and gravel sectors with endurance attrition over 200km+ (Paris-Roubaix winner, Flanders podiums). Exposed on sustained steep climbs (Amstel, Green Mountain) and acceleration-dependent finales requiring explosive kick versus diesel power.
vulnerability: Lacks final acceleration against pure sprinters when scouted closely; gets dropped on sustained steep gradients (15%+); makes tactically questionable energy expenditure (90-mile breakaways day before suited stages). Declining acceleration capacity post-2021 visible against younger riders.
key_patterns: Second place finish pattern on gravel/selective finishes where explosive acceleration beats positioning (Strade Bianche 2017, multiple sprint losses)
Attacks 15-70km from finish to force tempo, rarely from <5km (Arbre 15km, LBL 70km probing, chapel climb)
Crashes/misses key selections in positioning battles before decisive terrain (Fleche 2x crash, Omloop missed split, LBL 2020 DNF)
Retains yellow jersey through aggressive bonus hunting and defensive positioning despite non-GC status (TdF 2018 multiple stages)
BMC/CCC teams control race entirely but exhaust before delivering him to finale (Oman 2019, multiple leadout failures)
Resilience pattern: recovers from mid-race crashes/setbacks to still contend (Roubaix Wallers crash to win, TdF 2018 Froome crash chase)
form_trajectory: negative: 2022 showing acceleration deficit versus Pogačar on climbs, 2021 tactically poor breakaway choices, declining from 2017-2018 peak Monument/yellow jersey form
built_from: 2021 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
